summary: Preflight artifact at main abaa4326d81b56da1c468190a5006365b2a49cdc shows no security-sensitive hydrated refs. #53641 remains the canonical open issue for ordinary Discord message.send attachment false-success, narrowed by the hydrated Clawsweeper review to direct buffer-backed sends. The remaining open refs are related but split into distinct subfamilies: Discord MIME/WebP preservation (#41256/#41265), poll/components schema overexposure (#42820/#43015/#46455/#65301), Discord thread-reply aliases (#43570/#43574), and send media hydration candidates (#57335/#63578). No high-confidence close action is planned because each open issue has unique scope or is blocked on unmerged PRs with failing checks or actionable bot-review findings.
